summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of KAPTA REACH BOOST landing page. All 11 specified features tested and working correctly. French content, Framer Motion animations, glassmorphism effects, and Electric Royal Blue CTAs all implemented properly.
passed_tests: Navbar with logo 'KAPTA MÉDIA' and navigation links
Desktop 'AUDIT GRATUIT' CTA button functionality
Hero section with badge 'INFRASTRUCTURE DE VISIBILITÉ'
Headline with 'CONTRÔLE' in blue color
Hero CTA 'SÉCURISER MA ZONE' with smooth scroll
Trust elements (NFC, Certifié, Exclusif)
Phone mockup with floating parallax cards
Problem comparison section with L'INVISIBLE vs LA DOMINATION cards
Stats row displaying +300%, N°1, 4.9★
Mechanism section with 4 animated steps and connecting line
Pricing section with PACK CONTENU 290€ and OPTIMISATION 360° 350€
FOUNDER PARTNER badge on premium pricing card
FAQ section with accordion functionality
30-day guarantee box
Contact form with all required fields (name, phone, email, business, message)
Form validation for required fields
Form submission with success message display
Footer with dark background and CTA
Footer phone number 06 86 01 80 54
Mobile sticky CTA appearing after hero scroll
Mobile phone CTA linking to tel:0686018054
Smooth scroll navigation for all CTAs to contact section
Navigation links scrolling to respective sections
Pricing CTAs scrolling to contact form
Responsive design working on mobile and desktop
